title: mallotus khasianus
intro: Mallotus khasianus, also known as Khasian wax tree, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its latex sap, which is rich in flavonoids and has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mallotus khasianus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Mallotus khasianus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or ointment, and its latex sap is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
